mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_notice (notice_title, notice_type, notice_content, status, is_top, create_by, create_time, deleted, remark) VALUES (#{noticeTitle}, #{noticeType}, #{noticeContent}, #{status}, #{isTop}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_notice
notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, status = #{status}, is_top = #{isTop}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_notice SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_notice WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_notice WHERE status = '1' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_top DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notice WHERE status = '1' AND is_top = 1 AND deleted = 0
